metric_caveats: This 25-record cap compares Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite direct extraction against verify-repair v2 and direct-path ladder anchors on matched records.
Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing.
Raw exact, normalized-label exact, schema validity, abstention, and evidence support are diagnostic.
Do not claim cost or primary-model candidacy until label metrics and latency are compared against GPT 4.1-mini verify-repair v2.
The model string gemini-3.1-flash-lite is validated by one-record smoke only; this cap is the first quality comparison.
This config targets the fixed Gan synthetic validation split and must not be described as published Gan benchmark reproduction.
